properties.description: Silver transformation pipeline. Calls Databricks notebook 04_silver_all_entities_job_params_v4 with load_type and ingestion_date. Reads all 17 entity Bronze JSON files from the Volume, applies data quality rules, and writes cleaned Delta tables to Silver Volume. Triggered by pl_bronze_api_master_v4 after ForEach completes.

p_load_type.description: full or incremental — passed to the notebook as load_type widget

p_ingestion_date.description: yyyy-MM-dd — the Bronze partition date to transform. Passed as ingestion_date widget.

activities.name: act_silver_transform
activities.description: Run Databricks notebook 04_silver_all_entities_job_params_v4. Reads Bronze JSON for all 17 entities, applies PySpark data quality pipeline (null PK, null CDC, corrupt cast, negative values, dedup), writes Silver Delta tables. Parameters are injected via baseParameters — the notebook raises ValueError if either is missing.
